answer:
The graph has edges: (2,1), (2,0), (2,3), (1,4), (4,3).  
A minimum vertex cover must include at least one endpoint of every edge. Choosing vertices 2 and 3 covers all edges: 2 covers (2,1), (2,0), (2,3); 3 covers (4,3) and also (2,3).  
Thus the minimum vertex cover is [2, 3].  

\boxed{A}
